name: Real Estate - Lead Capture and Qualification

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a real estate lead qualification assistant. Return ONLY valid JSON, nothing else."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Analyse this enquiry and return ONLY valid JSON.

Lead Name: " + $json.Lead_Name + "
Message: " + $json.Message_Text + "
Platform: " + $json.Platform + "

Return exactly:
{"intent": "BUY, RENT, or BROWSING",
"urgency": "HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW",
"lead_score": number 1-100,
"lead_tag": "HOT, WARM, or COLD",
"property_interest": "what type and area they want",
"budget": "their budget if mentioned or UNKNOWN",
"recommended_action": "one sentence on what to do next",
"reply_message": "warm friendly personalised reply. Start with 'Hi [First Name],' on its own line. Then a blank line. Then write each complete sentence as a full paragraph with no mid-sentence line breaks. Each paragraph separated by a blank line. Do not break sentences across lines."}

Scoring rules:
HOT (75-100): Ready to view, specific requirements, clear budget
WARM (50-74): Interested but vague, no urgency mentioned
COLD (0-49): Just browsing, no clear intent or budget

Return ONLY JSON, nothing else."}] }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Great to hear from you - ' + $('Parse Lead Analysis').item.json.Lead_Name }}
Properties available in your area
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Parse Lead Analysis').item.json.Lead_Name }},

Thanks for reaching out. Here is a quick overview of what we currently have available.

[Insert current listings or link to property page]

When you are ready to explore further, we are happy to arrange a viewing at your convenience.

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Thanks for reaching out — ' + $('Parse Lead Analysis').item.json.Lead_Name }}
parameters.message:
={{ $('Parse Lead Analysis').item.json.reply_message }}

To book a viewing at a time that suits you, use the link below:
https://cal.com/damii/property-viewing

To make the process as smooth as possible, please also have these ready before your viewing:

- Valid government issued ID
- Proof of funds or mortgage agreement in principle
- Proof of address (utility bill or bank statement)

This helps us move quickly if you find the right property.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

parameters.subject: ={{ 'HOT Lead - ' + $('Parse Lead Analysis').item.json.Lead_Name + ' - Act Now' }}

parameters.content:
## STAGE 1  LEAD CAPTURE

### INSTAGRAM,  FACEBOOK,  WHATSAPP  and  TALLY  form
### submissions   all  captured  simultaneously  and merged  into one  unified  data  stream

## STAGE 2 - DATA MAPPING

### Platform source detected and routed to correct mapping node.

### All fields standardised before AI processing.

## STAGE 3 - AI QUALIFICATION

### OpenAI analyses every lead message.

### Scores 1-100, detects intent, urgency, buying signals and generates personalized reply.

## STAGE 4 - LOG & ROUTE

### Every lead logged to Airtable CRM first.

### IF nodes route to HOT, WARM or COLD branch based on AI tag.

## HOT BRANCH

### Instant reply + document checklist sent to lead.

### Agent alerted immediately. Status: Awaiting Booking.

## WARM BRANCH

### Personalised reply sent to lead. 

### Agent notified. Status: Nurture.

## COLD BRANCH

### Property information sent to lead, Logged silently.

### Status: Cold.
